2026-06-12.patch_summary: This patch adds a new function, io_buffer_register_bvec(), which allows registering an array of bio vectors (bvecs) to be used in the io_uring context. This is a preparatory step for implementing zero-copy support over fuse using io_uring. The function takes several parameters, including the bvec array, its length, and flags for issue and release operations. It initializes an io_mapped_ubuf structure and sets up the bio vectors within it. If successful, it returns 0; otherwise, it returns a negative error code.
